/usr/bin/c++ -g -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -Wl,--whole-archive /home/runner/work/dedekind/dedekind/build2/libdedekind_category.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/cartesian_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/functor_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/kleisli_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/limit_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/logic_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/monad_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/morphism_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/natural_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/pullback_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/species_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/topoi_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_category.dir/src/test/cpp/modules/dedekind/category/total_test.cpp.o -o test_category  libdedekind_category.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Maind.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2d.a
